title: Real-world practices and barriers in endoscopic submucosal dissection training: International comprehensive survey.

signals: International survey reveals real-world ESD training gaps and barriers across multiple centers
Structured training curriculum assessment for complex endoscopic procedure
Multi-center data on skill acquisition and competency evaluation in advanced endoscopy
features.endorobotics_relevance: Identifies training bottlenecks and learning curves in manual ESD that robotic systems could address through enhanced visualization, precision, and standardized skill development platforms.
